rationale.fidelity: It correctly keeps valid inequalities as a computational strengthening of the same feasible integer set and objective, and refuses to turn runtime into profit.
rationale.managerial_framing: It identifies plausible deadline, cadence, scale, and incumbent-quality pathways while clearly stating that none is supplied; this is the right managerial diagnosis for the prompt.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: It explicitly leaves scholarly positioning unassessed and does not invent a literature relationship; no positioning was requested.
rationale.evidence_discipline: The benchmark speed result is narrowly scoped as supplied evidence, while profit, universality, hardware, solver, and pathway limits are made explicit.
rationale.prose_clarity: The layered structure is useful, but encoding corruption and some repetition reduce polish and readability.
rationale.overall: The response clears the total-score, fidelity, managerial, evidence, and prose requirements but does not meet the universal scholarly-positioning minimum; therefore the rubric-derived result is fail.
